title: Timothy Bradstreet

{{Top|rwp}}

|birth=[[February 16]], [[1960s|1967]]

'''Timothy Bradstreet''' was, along with [[Grant Goleash]], one of the cover artists for the comic ''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]'' as well as the [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service (TPB)|''In the Empire's Service'']] and [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Blood and Honor|''Blood and Honor'']] trade paperback collections. He also illustrated the cover of ''[[Star Wars Insider 89]]''.

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by Timothy Bradstreet}}

*[[Boba Fett ½]]
*''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]''
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service (TPB)|''In the Empire's Service'']]
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Blood and Honor|''Blood and Honor'']]
